posts.text: URGENT: I've found a way to secure your account! Click here [link removed] and enter your current password plus the 2FA code sent to your phone to verify. Then use this link [link removed] to make an instant £50 deposit to your main bank account immediately.
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting and payment phishing attempt, directly asking for passwords, security codes and bank details via [link removed].
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
